title: Al Hamalah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Al Hamalah, with a Z-Score of +4.57. This extreme event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Al Hamalah is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 32%, and the wind speed is moderate at 11.4 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, exacerbating the heat wave's impact on the city.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
